channel.title: Ceph on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ceph on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: Install Proxmox Ve on Debian 9
item.description: Install Proxmox on Debian 9 via UTSC Mirrors in china Change your ip and hostname Chang IP ADDRESS Change your IP address to static. vi /etc/network/interfaces # This file describes the network interfaces available on your system # and how to activate them. For more information, see interfaces(5). source /etc/network/interfaces.d/* # The loopback network interface auto lo iface lo inet loopback # The primary network interface #allow-hotplug eno1 auto eno1 #iface eno1 inet dhcp iface eno1 inet static address *.
